_comment: Curated Atom/RSS feeds for the trusted-source scanner. Hand-edited. Add high-signal sources here (specific authors, vendor changelogs, conference talks). The scanner files a source-submission issue for each new entry. Per-feed scanning state lives in registry/trusted-feeds-state.json so this file stays diff-clean.

_schema.id: stable short identifier (used as key in state file)
_schema.source_type: one of: blog-post, documentation, discussion, paper, practitioner-repo, failure-report (matches source-submission.yml dropdown)
_schema.description: one-line note about why this source is trusted
_schema.max_per_run: (optional) cap new entries filed per scan. Default: 3

feeds.description: Simon Willison — high-signal LLM tooling commentary and experiments
Armin Ronacher — practitioner notes on AI coding workflows
GitHub changelog — Copilot/Actions/Issues changes that affect agent integration surfaces
LangChain blog — agent architectures, tool-use patterns, and LLM orchestration practitioner notes
